fixes.description: Submenu item selector '[role="menuitem"]' targeted <li> elements which cannot receive programmatic .focus(). Changed all 3 query locations to use submenuItemSelector constant '[role="menuitem"] a, [role="menuitem"] button' to target the actual focusable <a> elements inside each <li>.
locations: requestAnimationFrame callbacks ('freshItems') for ArrowDown and ArrowUp
fixes.approach: Extracted selector into a top-level constant 'submenuItemSelector' and replaced all 3 querySelectorAll calls that were used for focus management.

fixes.description: Same root cause as FQA-001 — ArrowDown/Up navigation within the dropdown also used '[role="menuitem"]' in handleSubmenuKeydown. Fixed by the same submenuItemSelector change.
Added aria-label="Main navigation" to <ul role="menubar"> in HeaderMain.php and useInnerBlocksProps first arg in HeaderMain.tsx.
Added aria-orientation="horizontal" to <ul role="menubar"> in HeaderMain.php and useInnerBlocksProps first arg in HeaderMain.tsx.

lintFix.description: Prettier formatting error introduced by __() call spacing — changed __( "Main navigation", "takt" ) to __("Main navigation", "takt") to match project prettier config.
